aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic level of AEO readiness with some critical areas for improvement. The website includes essential service information and contact details but lacks depth in content and user engagement features.
quick_wins: Enhance website content with location-specific keywords and detailed service descriptions.
Implement a review generation strategy to build a strong Google Business Profile.
Optimize for mobile users by ensuring fast load times and a responsive design.

gbp_analysis.summary: The business does not have an active Google Business Profile (GBP), which significantly impacts local search visibility.
critical_issues: Lack of customer reviews and ratings.
Missing essential business information such as hours of operation and photos.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone number) information on its website but lacks citations on external directories and platforms.
action_items: Create and verify NAP citations on major directories like Yelp, Yellow Pages, and Bing Places.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms and social media profiles.
Monitor and update citations regularly to maintain accuracy.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of local SEO optimization and GBP presence
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for local HVAC services in Orlando
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Claim and optimize a Google Business Profile
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Publish high-quality, locally relevant content and engage with the community through events or sponsorships

page_title: Orlando AC Repair - Residential Air Conditioning Service
